One App, Two Roles

Download once.
Choose your path.

Whether you're tracking your own wellness or supporting someone you care about — Biotrax adapts to your role from the very first screen.

⬇
Download
One app on iOS & Android. No separate downloads needed.
👤
Create account
Quick sign-up. Private by design, your data stays yours.
🔀
Choose your role
Member or Coach — the app transforms to fit your needs.
✨
Your personalised app
A completely tailored experience from onboarding onwards.
Which role is right for you?

Two experiences,
one shared mission.

● Member

Track your own wellness journey

Get a real-time window into your nervous system. Biotrax turns your biometrics into a wellness score that helps you understand — and communicate — how you're really feeling.

  • ✓ Daily wellness score with trend history
  • ✓ Sleep, stress & HRV tracking
  • ✓ Isolation & communication patterns
  • ✓ Early spiral detection alerts
  • ✓ Controlled sharing with your Coach
● Coach

Support someone you care about

Whether you're a therapist, a family member, or a friend — the Coach view gives you the overview you need to spot early signs and show up at the right moment.

  • ✓ Live wellness overview for your members
  • ✓ At-risk pattern alerts
  • ✓ Sleep, stress & social summaries
  • ✓ Check-in prompts & messaging
  • ✓ Watch sync status & data freshness
Why Biotrax Works

Stop guessing.
Start tracking.

Depression leaves biological footprints. Biotrax turns vague feelings into clear, actionable data.

🌙
Sleep Tracking
Score your sleep quality nightly. Consistent sleep patterns are the #1 predictor of recovery trajectory.
💓
Stress & HRV
Your heart rate variability tells the truth about your nervous system — even when you can't find the words.
💬
Isolation & Comms
Track social engagement and communication frequency. Withdrawal is often the first sign of a depressive spiral.
📍
Location Habits
Stable routines signal stability. When location patterns drift, Biotrax notices before you do.
🔒
Private by Design
On-device processing. You choose exactly what your Coach sees. Nothing is shared without your explicit consent.
⌚
Apple Watch Sync
Continuous passive data from your wrist. No manual logging — Biotrax works quietly in the background.
